arts.ttl: Man United transfer repeat must be avoided as Arsenal expected to sanction deal
arts.sum: Dortmund were looking at a loan deal for Veiga, meaning they will probably want the same for Zinchenko. The Ukranian has fallen doen the pecking order at Arsenal with Myles Lewis-Skelly's emergence this season coming after the signing of Riccardo Calafiori in the summer and it means that Zinchenko is expected to be allowed to leave before the end of the month.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Gunners defender nearing Emirates exit with Borussia Dortmund leading race
arts.sum: Arsenal defender Oleksandr Zinchenko is reportedly closing in on a move to Bundesliga giants Borussia Dortmund before the transfer deadline.

arts.ttl: Revealed: Man United eclipse Arsenal and Chelsea European record after Bruno Fernandes' late show against Rangers
arts.sum: Manchester United were able to surpass Arsenal and Chelsea to claim a European record statistic thanks to Bruno Fernandes' late winner against Rangers .

arts.ttl: Oleksandr Zinchenko closes on Arsenal exit as European giants make transfer swoop
arts.sum: Oleksandr Zinchenko has endured a frustrating season at Arsenal, with Mikel Arteta now ready to let the Ukrainian star leave before the end of this month's transfer window

arts.ttl: Barcelona make approach to sign Arsenal youngster
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have initiated contact over a potential deal for highly-regarded Arsenal youngster Ayden Heaven. That’s according to transfer insider Fabrizio Romano, who has on Thursday provided an…

arts.ttl: Man Utd Transfer News Today: Chelsea make Garnacho BID, New Dorgu OFFER, Arsenal WONDERKID wanted
arts.sum: Man Utd Transfer News Today: Chelsea make Garnacho BID, New Dorgu OFFER, Arsenal WONDERKID wanted All the latest Manchester United transfer news and rumours today (Thursday January 23), including the latest on Patrick Dorgu, Alejandro Garnacho and Ayden Heaven.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Transfer News Today: Leipzig's Sesko DECISION, Man Utd plot wonderkid RAID, Zubimendi LATEST
arts.sum: RB Leipzig director Marcel Schafer has insisted that Benjamin Sesko will not leave the club this month despite strong interest from the likes of Arsenal. Arsenal Transfer News Today: Leipzig's Sesko DECISION, Man Utd plot wonderkid RAID, Zubimendi LATEST

arts.ttl: Arsenal star opens door to summer exit as talks take place for transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal are set to see a number of exits this summer as things stands with Jorginho, Kieran Tierney and Thomas Partey all in the final six months of their contracs at the Emirates

arts.ttl: Former Arsenal cult hero gives three-word verdict when asked if his former club should sign Nigerian striker Victor Osimhen
arts.sum: A pundit who earned status as a cult hero at Arsenal during his playing career has given his verdict on whether the club should sign Victor Osimhen .

arts.ttl: Arsenal face striker transfer decision as £42m Benjamin Sesko alternative 'available' in January
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has issued several public cries for help to the board as injuries continue to plague the Gunners manager, though they have somewhat alleviated in recent days. Though Arsenal would rather sign one of their long-term targets this summer, there is one very good option that could be available in January and at a much lower price.
